DECLARATION OF DAVID A. SUMMERS IN SUPPORT OF REPLY TO OPPOS TO MOTION FOR ORDER: 1) SETTLING AND APPROVING RECEIVER'S FINAL REPORT; 2) DISCHARGING RECEIVER; 3) EXONERATING RECEIVER'S BOND; AND 4) CHARGING PARTIES WITH OUTSTANDING FEES AND COSTS; FILED BY OTHER SUMMERS, DAVID A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DAVID SUMMERS' MOTION FOR SETTLING AND APPROVING RECEIVER'S FINAL REPORT; DISCHARGING RECEIVER; EXONERATING RECEIVER'S BOND; CHARGING PARTIES WITH OUTSTANDING FEES AND COSTS. COUNSEL ACCEPTS THE TENATATIVE RULING AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING, GRANTED. RECEIVER'S REPORT IS APPROVED: RECEIVER'S ACTS AND JUDGMENT APPROVED. BOND IS EXONERATED. RECEIVER'S TOTAL COMPENSATION IS APPROVED; $61,684.36, OF WHICH THE RECEIVER HAS RECEIVED $46,094.33. COUNSEL'S COMPENSATION OF $35,257.50 IS APPROVED, COUNSEL HAVING RECEIVED $22,899.00. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE CHARGED A PROPORTIONATE AMOUNT, EXCEPT THAT DEFENDANT'S SHARE INCREASED BY $2,813.86. ESTATE TERMINATED UPON PAYMENT OF THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE RECEIVERSHIP ESTATE. MR. GRIFFINGER INDICATES THAT COUNSEL MAY STIPULATE TO DIFFERENT COMPENSATION AMOUNTS. MR. GRIFFINGER IS TO SUBMIT AN ORDER, IN COMPLAINCE WITH CRC 391. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR 5963

MINI MINUTES: OTHER DAVID SUMMERS Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Settling And Approving Receiver'S Final Report; Discharging Receiver; Exonerating Receiver'S Bond; Charging Parties With Outstanding Fees And Costs

DAVID SUMMERS' MOTION FOR SETTLING AND APPROVING RECEIVER'S FINAL REPORT; DISCHARGING RECEIVER; EXONERATING RECEIVER'S BOND; CHARGING PARTIES WITH OUTSTANDING FEES AND COSTS.
APPEARANCES: WILLIAM D. WHITEMAN (415.989.5200) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT J. ROTHMAN, ESQUIRE (415.392.3661) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THEODORE A. GRIFFINGER, JR. (STEIN & LUBIN, 415.981.0550) APPEARING FOR RECEIVER.
RULING: COUNSEL ACCEPTS THE TENATATIVE RULING AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING, GRANTED. RECEIVER'S REPORT IS APPROVED: RECEIVER'S ACTS AND JUDGMENT APPROVED. BOND IS EXONERATED. RECEIVER'S TOTAL COMPENSATION IS APPROVED; $61,684.36, OF WHICH THE RECEIVER HAS RECEIVED $46,094.33. COUNSEL'S COMPENSATION OF $35,257.50 IS APPROVED, COUNSEL HAVING RECEIVED $22,899.00. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE CHARGED A PROPORTIONATE AMOUNT, EXCEPT THAT DEFENDANT'S SHARE INCREASED BY $2,813.86. ESTATE TERMINATED UPON PAYMENT OF THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE RECEIVERSHIP ESTATE. MR. GRIFFINGER INDICATES THAT COUNSEL MAY STIPULATE TO DIFFERENT COMPENSATION AMOUNTS. MR. GRIFFINGER IS TO SUBMIT AN ORDER, IN COMPLAINCE WITH CRC 391. (302/PJM/AP) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR 5963
